name: Bidirectional FMT frailty and gut-muscle-axis study in young and old mice
summary: Animal study testing bidirectional fecal microbiota transplantation between young and old mice, with frailty, muscle, gut barrier, inflammatory, SCFA, LPS, and TLR4/NF-kB pathway readouts.
model_system: Young and old mice receiving bidirectional fecal microbiota transplantation
